import requests

@app.get("/details")
def get_details(ids: List[str]):
    # Violation: outbound HTTP call per item in a request handler (slow and unscalable)
    results = []
    for item_id in ids:
        resp = requests.get(f"https://api.service/item/{item_id}", timeout=2)
        results.append(resp.json())
    return results
